productDisplayName: Nike Men Dual Fusion White Sports Shoes
description: These Dual Fusion shoes for men from nike with plush cushioning and supportive Fit are designed for runners. The single-layer mesh upper gives a breathable, comfortable fit while the pylon midsole gives cushioning, support and stability.
